title: Create: Think Bigger! (Server Side)
description: Server side version for "Create: Think Bigger!" Project.
body:

### **Use our code "CTB25" on** [**SparkedHost (Affiliate)**](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3231) **for 25% off on your next purchase!**

# WELCOME TO THE CREATE: THINK BIGGER! ūüíĽ

![ctbv2.5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eab52cf0ee1570f038c3b4c41c43a8b6cf52e48c.png)

This is a Server-Side version, since the [CTB](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ctb) has some Client-Side mods, server crashes.

‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį‚Ėį

## Found bugs?

If you find bugs, please report it in out [Github issue tracker](https://github.com/CreateThinkBigger/Create-Think-Bigger/issues) or in our [Discord](https://discord.gg/2RQc4kEGdT) bug reports.


## Is your game crashing?

Upload the logs to [MCLO](https://mclo.gs), and send the link in one of our channels specified above.

## Legal

***Notice: Since this modpack is under the GNU Lesser General Public License version 3 (LGPLv3) you can do whatever the license says you can, everything below are just some guidelines I'd like you guys to follow.***  

Rehosting: **NO!** You may **NOT** rehost (reupload) this modpack on any website you have to link back to this page if you want to make a post about this modpack.

## 

***! EVERY MOD UNDER ARR THAT IS USED IN THE CTB MODPACK IS USED UNDER THE MODS OWNERS PERMISSION !***
